entry.title: Call Business Object Interface from outside S4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to Create a Billing Plan from Integration Suite. I was looking for APIs but did not find any. The only thing I found is this BO https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_CABILLGPLNTP_2 

My question is it possible to call it from Cloud Integration? If so, How can we do that

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Luzern
entry.content:
Hallo @ivabeg 

Vielen Dank für deine Nachricht. Leider ist unser SAP Stammtisch Event aktuell ein reiner Präsenztermin, ohne das notwendige technische Equipment für eine Aufnahme. Gib doch bitte kurz an, ob du dich speziell für eines oder beide der Themen interessierst. Wir können dann versuchen, die jeweiligen Kerninhalte z.B. auch als Blogbeitrag zur Verfügung zu stellen. Danke für dein Verständnis und dein Feedback.

Liebe Grüsse
Marco

entry.title: Re: Linkage between SAP ISU and SAP .R/3
entry.content:
Hello Amlan.

Thanks for sharing your insights.

Do you have more information on the following point?

@AmlanBanerjee wrote:

2. A R/3 System is must for financial consolidation purpose. From a finance perspective, IS-U FICA is a sub-ledger and it would require an ERP system for Consolidation of all the non-statistical transactions posted in IS-U. The R/3 System can be in the same box as of IS-U System or they can be in two different box, where in you have develop a mechanism(IDOCS, Flat file) to transfer the transaction values of the reconciliation keys from ISU to R/3.

Let´s say the R/3 and the ISU system are now on one ECC and should be split up in one ECC core (MM, FI, SD, etc. modules) system and one ISU ECC standalone system.

How can the systems be setup if R/3 and ISU are not in the same box?
Do you have some suggestions, best practices, links or hints for a ISU standalone setup connected with R/3 interfaces?

How would those interfaces have to be setup?

BR

Igor

entry.title: Which of the following can you use to extend an SAP Fiori Elements application?
entry.content:
Can someone help me to understand what should be the correct answer for this question related to sap fiori elements? As per my understanding it should be A and B but I am getting confused with CDS extension option

Which of the following can you use to extend an SAP Fiori Elements application?
Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question.
A. App extension
B. Adaption extensions
C. ABAP extension
D. CDS extension

entry.title: Re: Message Mapping Vs XSLT Mapping vs Groovy Script Whic...
entry.content:
It really depends on your skills. 

I really like XSLT for mappings of XML documents

entry.title: Transition from SAP BYDESIGN TO S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD - Accelerator Adoption
entry.content:
Introduction

Data migration is a crucial process that ensures a seamless transition from a legacy system to a new system. The primary goal is to maintain business continuity while ensuring user acceptance of the new environment. The success of data migration depends on selecting the right method and flow for efficiently transferring data from source to destination.

In this specific case, the challenge was migrating from an existing SAP Business ByDesign system to an S/4HANA system. The following sections outline our general approach and provide key insights from the project. Fortunately, SAP provides tools and active support for this process.

Selecting the Migration Flow

When planning a data migration, it is essential to determine the right sequence and approach. Key aspects include:

  • Understanding business data and its dependencies
  • Defining a structured migration plan
  • Ensuring data integrity and transformation accuracy
  • Prioritizing critical business processes

During the project, we had to ensure that revenue processes continued to function smoothly after migration. This is always dependent on the company's industry. Key migration objects should be identified early and given the highest priority from the start. In this case, ensuring a clean migration of customer projects was the top priority. This naturally led to dependencies, such as customer master data, making priorities clear.

Since migration often involves a transformation of business processes, it is crucial to focus on the new target processes and derive the necessary migration steps accordingly.

Key Aspects of Migration

A successful migration requires careful planning and execution. The most important aspects include:

  • Data Extraction – Identifying source data and ensuring quality
  • Data Transformation – Adapting data structures as needed
  • Data Validation – Ensuring correctness and completeness
  • Data Transfer – Efficiently loading data into the target system
  • Testing and Reconciliation – Verifying data accuracy post-migration

Utilise SAP provided Accelerators

Accelerators are embedded in the Activate methodology, particular attention should be given to transition specific content, particularly the migration iFlows. The iFlows map and transform many of key master and transactional objects and can lead to significant timesaving, see these blogs for more details: Data Migration Accelerator: SAP Business ByDesign to S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition and Data Migration: SAP Business ByDesign to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition (XML & CSV)

Also do subscribe to SAP Business Accelerator Hub for more information on Migration Accelerators :

Discover Product Integrations | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Adoption and Expansion: IFlow Implementation

SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) and IFlows play a significant role in data migration. Their benefits include:

  • Simplified integration between systems
  • Automated data transformation
  • Enhanced monitoring and error handling

Testing requires a robust system landscape, including:

  • Development and quality assurance environments
  • Simulation of real-world business scenarios
  • End-to-end testing to validate integration

Use Case: Master Data IFlow Challenges

In this project, the main modifications focused on the Message Mapping component within IFlow to ensure correct data transformation from SAP Business ByDesign to S/4HANA Public Cloud.

The main challenges included:

  • Understanding predefined IFlows developed by the SAP team
  • Handling complex data transformations
  • Debugging unexpected errors in Message Mapping

IFlow Utilization and Modifications

  • Focused primarily on modifying Message Mapping
  • Added filtering and scripting elements where necessary
  • Retained core artifacts while ensuring compliance with business requirements

Challenges and Solutions

Challenges:

  • Lack of initial familiarity with existing IFlows
  • Unexpected errors due to complex transformations
  • Efficiently handling large volumes of data

Solutions:

  • Close collaboration with the SAP team for guidance
  • Iterative testing and debugging
  • Leveraging best practices in CPI and Message Mapping

Conclusion

This project provided valuable learning experiences, particularly in working with existing IFlows within SAP CPI. The process was challenging but rewarding, emphasizing the importance of structured migration planning, collaboration, and continuous learning.

The successful modification of Message Mapping and ensuring data integrity led to a satisfying outcome, demonstrating the impact of effective integration strategies.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management - Possible to avoid "MIRO" GUI app in connected system
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have been using Central Invoice Management for two months now, after having used 'Invoice processing with OpenText' (DE_1LE).
Since using CIM, we have invoices that have to be processed in the connected system in the GUI app ‘MIRO’ instead of in the Fiori apps ‘FB60’ and ‘F0859’, as was the case with the OpenText solution, because functions are required that the Fiori apps do not support. In our use case, Central Invoice Management is used by our accounting department and should be forwarded directly to the FI apps in the connected system. Even after intensive research, we still don't understand why these invoices now suddenly have to be processed via the ‘MIRO’ GUI app.

Is there a (technical) way to bypass the use of the GUI app ‘MIRO’, in case of doubt also with regard to our procurement process?

Many thanks in advance and best regards

Simon

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the co...
entry.content:
Hello, Colleagues!
Maybe it makes sense to register my use-case as the valid use-case for the database management, and implement improvement if there is no solution for it.
As I'm following manual and it looks like current version of restore process doesn't support it!
Thanks!
SAP SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: In BAS, ui5-deploy.yaml files in all applications have an "Unable to load schema ..."
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the same issue, does anyone have a solution?

entry.title: QueryContactIN - Unexpected results ?!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am running what looks to be a simple query to return Contact Info FOR A SINGLE Contact by looking up via email address.

The POST I am using is:

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<soap:Body>
<ContactByElementsQuery_sync xmlns="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
<ContactSelectionByElements>
<SelectionByWorkplaceEmailURI>
<InclusionExclusionCode>I</InclusionExclusionCode>
<IntervalBoundaryTypeCode>1</IntervalBoundaryTypeCode>
<LowerBoundaryName>info@redacted.com</LowerBoundaryName>
</SelectionByWorkplaceEmailURI>
</ContactSelectionByElements>
<ProcessingConditions>
<QueryHitsMaximumNumberValue>1</QueryHitsMaximumNumberValue>
<QueryHitsUnlimitedIndicator>false</QueryHitsUnlimitedIndicator>
</ProcessingConditions>
</ContactByElementsQuery_sync>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

.... HOWEVER (!), I am getting what looks like a huge list (maybe all our contacts) of contacts, regardless of their email address ?

Would anybody know why the above is not just returning the single contact that has email address 'info@redacted.com' ?

Thanks in advance,

Mark

entry.title: GR reclassification issue
entry.content:
Dear SAPexpert

When using the S2040 reclassification method, I observed an unusual phenomenon: the ACDOCU-TEXT field contains an additional text entry without a step symbol. This type of data is causing duplication in the reclassified data. Could you please explain the reason for this issue? Notably, such texts do not appear in my test environment.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAC Date Calculation in DA
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP FSM Checklist Instance Elément translations
entry.content:
Hi Khalid

You could make use of ChecklistInstanceElement.selectedIndex, which is 0 for the first option, 1 for the second option, and so on. This would make the logical condition independent from language.

Best regards

    Raphael Barabas

entry.title: Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News February 2025
entry.content:
Welcome to our latest #SAP Cloud ALM update in February 2025! This month, we're thrilled to share a variety of new features designed to innovate and empower your project management, monitoring, and traceability capabilities. We’ll dive into the top 10 highlights from this February release to help you stay ahead in your digital transformation journey.

 

IMPLEMENTATION UPDATES

1. Automate and Schedule Transport Deployments

The new app in Deployment enables scheduling and automation of multi-feature deployment transport across your system landscape.

 

Find also more information in this blog post by @moritzgysler. 

 

2. Solution Process Viewer

When viewing solution activity details in the Solution Process Viewer, you can now see assigned applications and their types (e.g., SAP Fiori, Transaction, URL, SAP Web Dynpro). Custom applications also display the Display ID stored in the Library.

 

3. Assignment of applications

With the new Relations tab, you can now assign application library elements to test cases, enhancing overall test coverage and traceability in your implementation project; moreover, you can monitor the statuses of related test cases directly from the Libraries app.

 

4. Custom Solution Process Action History

You can now view a comprehensive history of actions performed on custom solution processes via an icon at the top of the process list. This history includes the action type, the user who performed it, and the timestamp, with the ability to switch between chronological and reverse chronological order, search, or filter by time range and action type (such as Created, Restored, Published, Created Draft, Edited, Archived and Deleted). Additionally, users can directly access the corresponding custom solution process from links within the history.

 

5. Enhanced Traceability in Solution Process Defects

You can now view both direct and indirect assignments in the Solution Process Traceability app. By clicking a bar chart in the Defects column, a popup displays directly assigned defects, with an option to enable the display of indirect assignments.

 

6. Role-Based Restrictions on Test Plan Actions

To prevent accidental loss of test results, only users with the roles of Project Administrator or Project Lead can delete test plans containing executed test cases or unassign such test cases from test plans. Project Members can still perform these actions on test plans and test cases that haven't been executed yet.

 

7. Display of Solution Activities in Configuration Details

Solution activities that were assigned to configurations are now displayed in the detail view, with links to navigate to the Solution Activity app.

 

 

OPERATIONS UPDATES

8. Health Monitoring Integration with SAP Datasphere

Health Monitoring now supports SAP Datasphere, providing metrics for Storage and Events.

 

 

9. Monitoring Enhancement for SAP Broker Reconciliation

Users can now track detailed statuses of incoming and outgoing messages for SAP Broker Reconciliation for Commodity Derivatives, and drill down to inspect individual issues and message details.

 

10. New Outbound Logs Section in Event Situation Details

The Event Situation Details page now includes an Outbound Logs section, allowing users to view the status, count, and timestamps of stored event payloads, particularly useful for events where the "Store Event Payload for 24 Hours" action is enabled. This feature also updates the Event Situations table on the Overview page with log counts.

 

Get inspired, stay empowered, and always keep innovating with SAP Cloud ALM. Let's make this your best month yet!

Stay tuned for more exciting updates and visit the SAP Help Portal!

So, are you ready to revolutionize your SAP Cloud ALM experience? Buckle up and get ready to explore the future of efficient, agile, and insight-driven project management. Let's make your digital transformation journey even more exciting with these top 10 highlights from our February 2025 release.

entry.title: Re: How to Update NAST-AENDE to X
entry.content:
Hi,

This is insane. We followed the steps above, and the IDOC has been posted successfully. However, I'm curious about how this sudden approach actually helps from a technical standpoint. I'd like to understand this better.

Thank you,

Saurabh

entry.title: In MIRO, how can I add the Returns Handling Fee for a Credit Memo?
entry.content:
We have a scenario where the Supplier has indicated a Returns Handling Fee on the Credit Memo for items that were returned. This causes the problem that the Credit Memo is not for the full amount for the items returned.

How can I capture that Returns Handling Fee on the Credit Memo to allow it to be posted as the system does not want to post the Credit Memo if it is not for the full amount of $ 15,112.10?

Eg. SCreenshot of the Credit Memo from Supplier

entry.title: Re: Automating Employee Vacation Reminders in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: @SoDo, thank you for an interesting blog. Can you please confirm my understand that by forms in your blog you are referring to SuccessFactors Time Forms? Or is there another way for HR administrator to generate the reminder to employees? Thank you

entry.title: Enable Now provsion users
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible for Enable Now (SSO) to automatically assign a role, for example 'Learne', during provisioning or assigning SAML attributes ?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes it works with other country... but SAP specifies that no support will be provided for other country : https://me.sap.com/notes/912416/E

Regards

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502.1”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502.1 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

For any feedback you may have, try the Commenting Feature for What's New documentation in this release. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Why does SAP close after running a macro script?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

After running the macro script, the report downloads fine but the entire SAP closes. 

The "Windows Script Host" window also appears with the error described: The remote server machine does not exist or is unavaiable session.findByld. Please support. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components
entry.content:
It's better than "no support" as per note 912416 - Availability of Subcontracting with Chargeable Component

If a customer should choose to use SCC for subcontracting management of other countries, it must be understood that development support will be limited to bug fixing and any gaps found for those countries cannot be requested to be developed.

It means the support will be provided for technical issues (bugs) but not for missing functionalities required in countries other than Japan.

entry.title: Re: Beginner's guide to Data Flows in SAP Datasphere: A step by step approach
entry.content: sorry, wrong topic

entry.title: What are the advantages of the Sinon.JS framework?
entry.content:
What are the advantages of the Sinon.JS framework? (2 Correct)

A. It can be used with any JavaScript unit test framework
B. It supplies higher level test doubles for timers and AJAX requests
C. It provides support for Spies, stubs and mocks
D. It enables test-driven development

As per me option A,B and C all are correct. Which should be the right option?

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Escaped. Good fun, thanks!

entry.title: Re: PR release cancellation - hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello @Elena12 

There is not such a concept as "un-approval" in purchase requisition strategies. An approver can either approve or reject. If an approver choses to reject, the requisition is fully rejected, it is not directed back to the previous approver. A rejected requisition can be updated, then a release strategy can be redetermined and started again.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Analytics cloud for office - SAC
entry.content:
@vijaymuniraj 

It requires if you have a valid SAC license, the add-in is free to use. The only prerequisite is a license within SAC.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I've been working in SAP Build Process Automation for past few Days. 
Since yesterday i'm facing deployment issue while deploying a new version of my project.
I have also tried using different BTP Accounts or deploying other project -> same error  

Correlation ID: 3c303c32-58f6-4d7f-88ec-480870487119



Does anyone have any suggestions as to what else I could try?

@Sankara1 , @JesseSukhbayar , @Archana , @Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: Re: Why does Hybris startup hang when near SessionFixatio...
entry.content:
After updating to version 2211.32, I encountered the same issue. Since I run Hybris in a WSL environment, I limited the number of assigned processors.

Simply add or modify the following lines in .wslconfig under %UserProfile%:

[wsl2]
# Number of logical processors assigned to the WSL 2 VM
processors=12

entry.title: Re: Considering Implementing Dynamic Offer Letters in SuccessFactors? Here is Our Story
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for sharing your story with the dynamic offer tokens, super interesting! I am particularly curious about the formatting in the offer letter template when using these dynamic tokens. Did you encounter any challenges in this aspect? We are currently implementing dynamic offer tokens, and we've noticed that when a dynamic token is empty (due to null information in the offer detail template, as expected), it leaves a blank space in the template, which looks weird.

entry.title: Re: Why does Hybris startup hang when near SessionFixatio...
entry.content: Why restrict your whole WSL's performance when you can just set tomcat.startStopThreads= to limt the spawned threads of your local commerce environment?

entry.title: Trial Balance Profit Center Hierarchy
entry.content:
In the Trial Balance reporting app it is not possible to display the profit center hierarchy as a dimension.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Trial Balance Profit Center Hierarchy
entry.content: The workaround for adding the profit center hierarchy is maintained in KBA 3577162 - Trial Balance profit center hierarchy

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Extended Warehouse Management Private Edition 2023 FPS03 – What’s New
entry.content:
We have recently released the latest updates for SAP EWM with the SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Pack 3 update. The enhancements of this release further improve our Advanced Shipping & Receiving integration and functionalities, complementing the features we delivered in the SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Pack 2 release. Furthermore, with this release we introduced a new Machine Learning based feature, called “Predictive Labor Demand Planning”, empowering shift managers at the warehouse to more accurately and efficiently plan out the tasks for the day. And to start today’s deep dive, we will begin with it.

PREDICITVE LABOR DEMAND PLANNING

With the SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03 release, we deliver the new Machine-Learning based predictive labor demand planning (LDP) that can be used to predict planned workload data based on the picking and packing outbound processes. This enables warehouse shift managers and supervisors to plan resources and workloads more efficiently. Very summarily, LDP uses historical workload records to calculate a planned duration for warehouse workload records, and then use those records to plan outbound delivery orders.

 Historical workload records contain information about executed warehouse tasks (WTs) in the warehouse. They are not stored in an archive as all data is saved in the database, and outdated records are deleted. These records are only written for picking and packing tasks when a warehouse order is confirmed. These records contain application information that is mainly based on warehouse task data, with additional data from the assigned outbound delivery order.

The planned duration is a key component of a planned workload record. In labor management, you can use engineered labor standards to calculate the planned duration, but in labor demand planning, this is not necessary. Instead, labor demand planning uses historical workload records to calculate the planned duration for planned workload records.

Please note that if you have already set up engineered labor standards, they will still be used to calculate the planned duration. In this case, the system will not calculate based on historical workload records. You can also use engineered labor standards for one area of your warehouse and use calculations based on historical workload records for another area.

Outbound delivery order (ODO) processing includes picking and packing steps before the ODO item can be staged and loaded. You can use labor demand planning to get better visibility into the planned workload that is expected from outbound delivery orders. This allows you to predict peaks in the workload and balance the workload of the warehouse accordingly. The way LDP calculates ODO planned workloads is the following:

  1. The system searches for historical data that belongs to similar ODO items. The resulting data forms the basis of the calculations for the required data of the current ODO item.
  2. The system identifies the picking location, preferably by using rough bin determination.
  3. The system determines the external process step that is most used by similar ODO items.
  4. If similar ODO items require packing steps, the system calculates the packing steps based on the packing-picking ratio of the similar ODO items. The packing-picking ratio indicates how often the pick step of an outbound delivery order with similar attributes was followed by a pack step and is calculated from the historical workload data. Single pieces may need a pack step while whole pallet picks don’t need to be packed in addition.

 With LDP, it is possible to view planned workload durations directly in the warehouse monitor, allowing for better visibility and control over task planning. This functionality improves operational efficiency by streamlining the planning process and ensuring more accurate and timely execution of warehouse tasks as well as reduce inefficiencies by predicting the time required for tasks such as picking, packing, and outbound deliveries.

This is only a first step for Predictive Labor Demand Planning, and we plan to build on top of this feature with future releases. But we will reveal those steps at a future date.

ADVANCED SHIPPING & RECEIVING UPDATES

With the SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03 release we continue to further extend the range of functionalities available with Advanced Shipping & Receiving as well as expand on existing ones. In the interest of time and convenience, I want to briefly touch upon every ASR update in one or two paragraphs, and we begin with integration to Global Trade Service:

  • Integration of Decentralized EWM and TM with GTS – This is a new integration of decentralized Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) and Transportation Management (TM) with SAP Global Trade Services (GTS) which supports the execution of the outbound, or export, process. It enables users to conduct compliance checks for freight units and freight orders and complete export declaration for consignments and freight orders.

  • Search for Advanced Shipping and Receiving Deliveries in Waves – In this release, we further build upon a feature we delivered in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, by enabling users to search for waves, wave items, and wave-relevant warehouse requests that are part of Advanced Shipping and Receiving deliveries in the Maintain Waves app (transaction /SCWM/WAVE) and the warehouse monitor (transaction /SCWM/MON).
  • Custom Checks for Loading Materials onto a Freight Order – We also provide BAdIs that add customer-specific checks for handling units or warehouse requests before loading execution in Advanced Shipping and Receiving. The checks take place during outbound delivery, and allow for the customer’s own logic for loading checks in:
    • The radio frequency (RF) screen before loading, where the system can show special warning or error message to the RF user
    • The App "Load or Unload Freight Orders", where the same or a similar BAdI is called when the loading execution function is used
    • The enterprise warehouse management (EWM) desktop transaction /SCWM/LOAD
  • TM Updates for Unpacked Products with Actual EWM Weight and Volume – With this update, when information regarding weight and volume for unpacked products in an outbound delivery order item is updated in Extended Warehouse Management (EWM), the relevant documents in Transportation Management (TM) are updated with the adjusted EWM weight and volume information. These updates are made after the “Ready for Shipping” status is set in EWM. The updated weight and volume are sent on product item level and on handling unit header level.

CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENTS

To round of today’s overview, I would like to also go over some of the final topics that came to be as a result of the most recent Customer Connect program:

  • Add Short Text to Goods Issue and Cancellation - With this feature, it is now possible to provide a short text for goods issues and cancellations in several apps. A text of up to 50 characters can now be manually entered, for example, to add an explanation or other information to the goods movement in the following apps: “Manage Physical Stock – Products” (F5340); “Manage Warehouse Documents” (F5341). This text can be seen in the relevant material documents in other components of SAP S/4HANA using the “Display Material Document List” app. If synchronous goods movements are used from Inventory Management to Extended Warehouse Management (only available in EWM embedded in SAP S/4HANA), text can be entered in the “Post Goods Movement” app (transaction MIGO). The text is visible in the corresponding goods movement document in EWM, and can be seen in the monitor node at Documents -> Warehouse Task. This functionality has also been added to the consume and scrap actions in the “Warehouse Physical Stock by Product” API.

  • Scanning Alternative HU IDs During RF Processing - With this feature, it is now possible to scan alternative handling unit (HU) IDs on vendor labels which the system converts them to internal Extended Warehouse Management Handling Unit IDs. Converting the alternative HU IDs in RF transactions removes the need to re-label the HUs or create custom RF screens. Note that if multiple HU IDs are assigned to one alternative HU ID, the relevant internal HU ID can be selected.

FIND OUT MORE!

To see more details on the above mentioned topics as well as see what other enhancements we delivered with this release, I highly encourage you to explore our latest “SAP EWM in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03 – What’s New” slide deck.

You can also find more technical details and documentation on the above listed topic and others we left out via the “What’s New” viewer on the Help Documentation portal.

For more information about SAP Extended Warehouse Management, please follow us on social media, our YouTube channel or our community pages:

SAP EWM Community

SAP YouTube Channel

EWM LinkedIn Community

SAP Extended Warehouse Management Roadmap Explorer

Release information and restrictions of embedded EWM on SAP S/4HANA 2023

Release information and restrictions of Decentralized EWM on SAP S/4HANA 2023

For a complete list of Q&A from the EWM community, please access this link:
https://answers.sap.com/tags/01200615320800000705

In case you do not find your specific question there, feel free to post your question via the following form:
https://answers.sap.com/questions/ask.html?primaryTagId=01200615320800000705

entry.title: Subcontracting in MTO with a purchase order or a service order?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario in which we have a

  1. Sales order > Production order  with 2 operations.
  2. Operation 1 is happening in-house 
  3. Operation 2 (Semi-finished) material is sent to subcontractor for operation 
  4. Once operation is completed, material is sent back to us .

In Step 3, for sending a material to subcontractor, we have an external operation. Here we create a purchase requisition, which should be converted to a service or a purchase order? and in process subcontractor will receive a semi-finished material from us and consume it create a finished material, where that consumption and goods receipt is happening when it comes to SAP document? 

please help me to understand a standard process.

entry.title: Re: The meaning of associations dimensions in the AM model
entry.content:
Hi @Lora0121 

Details can be found in https://me.sap.com/notes/0003487607. 

KR Simon

entry.title: Re: Storage location for each subcontractor in Production...
entry.content: thanks, in which case we should create a storage location and which not, what is recommended practice?

entry.title: Re: Web Dynpro Application for Monthly Financial Planning in SAP Commercial Project Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I share my experience.

In S/4 Hana 2021 is necessary activate the sets of the note: /CPD/CA_CPD_PFP_VFC_PLNG_AP /CPD/CA_BCS_CPD_PFP_VCS_PLN_TYPE
Then is necesary add the new application in custo of the CPM. If the web dynpro presents error 500 it will be necesary to activate the paquete /CPD/PFP_BI_CONTENT_BUNDLE from the transaction BSANLY_BI_ACTIVATION. This action updates the BW.

Regards

entry.title: SAP SFSF Integration Center
entry.content:
Hello all,
Greetings!

In the SAP SFSF integration center, what is the web service we can consume that list employee data and provides employee status via API?

Regards,
Hayery Ribeiro

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed

entry.title: Re: Enhance MB21
entry.content: Your tag S/4HANA (Public) Cloud is incorrect, it's S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content: Probably you didn't understand my question. Please read through once more.

entry.title: Material and Physical Inventory Documents number range change
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change Material and Physical Inventory Documents number range. I found out SSCUI '103896' - Define Number Assignment for Material and Physical Inventory Documents. Since number range is part of the cutover activity and does not create a transport, I'm trying to change it in the Test tenant under 'Implementation Activities', but I couln't find it?
Can anyone please guide me how can I change it?

entry.title: Re: API_PROJECT_V3(Create multiple WBS nodes and Get Next...
entry.content:
To get the Next available number I used the same API API_PROJECT_V3 to get a list of Projects(ProjectExternalID) and based on that list I made a groovy code to assign the lowest free number to property NewProjectNumber

 

// Process Data
def Message processData(Message message) {
    def parser = new XmlParser()

    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String);
    def root = parser.parseText(body)

    //Get the projectExternalIDs into a list
    def projectExternalIDs = root.'Project_Type'.'ProjectExternalID'.collect { it.text() }.sort()


    def nextNumber = 0

    //Loop through the projectExternalIDs
    for (ProjectID in projectExternalIDs) {

        //Get the number part of the external ID
        def numberPart = ProjectID.replaceAll("\\D", "")

        //If the nextNumber is 0(first pass on loop), set it to the numberPart
        if (nextNumber == 0)
            nextNumber = numberPart.toInteger()

        //If the numberPart is greater than the nextNumber, then we have found the next project
        if (numberPart.toInteger() > nextNumber) {

            def paddedNextNumber = String.format("%0" + numberPart.length() + "d", nextNumber)
            def nextProject = ProjectID.replaceAll("\\d*\$", "") + paddedNextNumber
            break
        } else

        //Possible next project
            nextNumber = numberPart.toInteger() + 1
        def paddedNextNumber = String.format("%0" + numberPart.length() + "d", nextNumber)
        nextProject = ProjectID.replaceAll("\\d*\$", "") + paddedNextNumber

    }

    message.setProperty("NewProjectNumber", nextProject);
    return message;

}

entry.title: HI all, I am using Gauge charts in sapui5 fiori but it was not working
entry.content:
Hi all, i am using justgage is t display the gauges in sapui5 fiori i had written the code but to it but still i am getting error that it would be like this TypeError: JustGage is not a constructor,

here is the controller code

 onAfterRendering: function () {
            this.GauegeDisplay();
        },
        //Semi-circle gauges
        GauegeDisplay: function() {

            new JustGage({
                id: this.getView().byId("id_Gauge1").sId,
                value: 67,
                min: 0,
                max: 100,
                title: "Sample 1 with HTML"
            });

            new JustGage({
                id: this.getView().byId("id_Gauge2").sId,
                value: getRandomInt(0, 100),
                min: 0,
                max: 100,
                title: "Sample 2 with FlexBox",
                label: "pounds",
                view: this.oView,size: 900,
            });

            new JustGage({
                id: this.getView().byId("id_Gauge3").sId,
                value: getRandomInt(0, 100),
                min: 0,
                max: 100,
                title: "Shadow effects",
                label: "",
                shadowOpacity: 1,
                shadowSize: 5,
                shadowVerticalOffset: 10,
                view: this.oView,
                size: 400,
            });
        },
and here is the view code for the above
content>
            <html:div id="id_Gauge1" stytle="width:25%; height:25%" />
            <FlexBox
                id="id_Gauge2"
                class="gauage"
            />
            <l:Grid
                id="id_Gauge3"
            />
        </content> and also added extra script tags in the index.html files, but it was displaying the same error 

any one please help me..

entry.title: service PO or a normal PO for a subcontracting in SAP MTO
entry.content:
Hi All,

In standard MTO we have a production order with an external operation to send the semi-finished material to a subcontrator, from the system point of view, in production order external operation, a purchase requisition will be generated. Here do we need a service purchase order or a normal purchase order? 

As a subcontractor will received a semi-finished material , perform a service and convert that to a finished material. 

Please suggest, shall we go with a service Po or a normal PO? 

As once operations / service is completed by the subcontractor, we will receive back the stock in our WH for packing etc.

entry.title: Re: Enhance MB21
entry.content:
Hello @taher123 

That is not possible without modifying MB21 substantially. 

Instead you can implement your own transaction, with a screen layout that you need and save reservations with the BAPI_RESERVATION_CREATE1 function.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Billing Document Not Released on Time – Background Jo...
entry.content:
On your statement

only the billing was released, not the invoice.

for me, both are same.  Is it that invoice and billing are different document types in your case ?

entry.title: SAP Signavio process manager - attribute mass changes
entry.content: Hello, regarding SAP Signavio Process Manager—does anyone know if it's possible to update process attributes (e.g., division, department) using an import/export function? For example, if the reporting structure changes and I need to update 'Operations' to 'Procurement' across multiple processes, is there a way to do this in bulk instead of manually editing each one? Any suggestions would be appreciated!

entry.title: Is it possible to send XML files to a server via SAP DM
entry.content:
For a project we want to push XML files from SAP DM to a server somewhere in the company domain. This server can be for example a sFTP server. 

It can also be a shop floor system with production connector. 

How can we achieve this with SAP Digital Manufacturing?

entry.title: Re: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice...
entry.content: If the process is a legal requirement and that is missing in SAP, you can very well raise a ticket to SAP.  In general, all legal and statutory requirements will be taken care by SAP with a standard SAP note

entry.title: Not the asssigned routemap is showing
entry.content:
Hi,

We are experiencing an issue where we assigned the route map to the compensation plan; however, when we launch the forms, our assigned route map is not being applied. Instead, a different route map is triggered (see screenshot):

We modified the route map and even created a new one, but only the route map with the step "Alternate Route User Step" is being used as the starting point. This issue does not occur in the DEV and PROD instances—only in TEST.

Is there any explanation for this?

Thanks.

Kind Regards,

Erika

entry.title: Settlement Management - Condition Contract - Business Volume Selection Criteria
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some questions about condition contract. 

1. What is the relation between contract header customer and customer mentioned in business volume selection criteria?

2. Business volume selection criteria check total invoice amount for sales rebate which we see at WB2R_BUSVOL in REBV field. I have two questions here.

i) I found in SPRO configuration that its consider all subtotal fields of VBRP & NETWR and one another field. But I am clear on caudation part.

ii) Dose it considers only F2 invoice or all other invoice also such as S1, G2, L2, P5, P8,

3. How can I check invoice no wise REBV in WB2R_BUSVOL?

Thanks,

Arindam

entry.title: Re: Integration of DMS and PM for Document Attachment
entry.content:
Hi @Silambarasan ,

you did not share the SPRO to enable the DMS bottom on the Maintenance Order, only on Notification.

Do you have any idea how can I enable the DMS feature at the Maintenance Order?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
Ciao Juwin.

The problem is that TEXT is not a structure so these suggested  variants cannot be used.

... { struc-(comp) } 
  | { dref->(comp_name) } 
  | { COMPONENT comp OF STRUCTURE struc } ...

I suggest to declare a proper structure like my_text and to put or duplicate the text symbol's values there as subcomponents.

entry.title: Two Group Currency Extension Version with the same currency - error msg
entry.content:
I created a Group Currency Extension Version in automatic run mode with GBP as the currency. After conducting various tests, we realized that it is better to have the Group Currency Extension Version in manual run mode.

The problem arises when I attempt to create a new Group Currency Extension Version in GBP. The system displays an error message indicating that it is not possible to create a new version of the Group Currency Extension Version because one already exists in GBP.

entry.title: Overloaded - Load not able to complete GI(OUTB)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have an issue where the load is overloaded for the inbound delivery (5931362) EWM-1379.Please need your support to rectify the issue.

regards

Shiva

entry.title: Re: Costs & Revenues getting mapped against separate WBS...
entry.content:
Hi @Ken_Melching 

I feel like Archimedes now, only I do not have a bathtub. Thank you. And thank you @RogerEarle, I figured out the method and then I saw your answer.

Solution: Right-click on WBS Element column and choose Select Hierarchy.

Just click Search and you will get an SAP default hierarchy for WBS. Then click OK.

Viola! We have the desired result, as answered by @RogerEarle. We can then just sort it by the ID, and also expand the hierarchy.

Regards,

Pratap.

Are there a working templates with an example regarding the same. 

Note: There are many UoM for the same item and I am trying to upload for all of them, but even when I tried for one UoM I got the same result as explained above.

entry.title: Re: SAP SFSF Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi Hayey,

Usually we use the ''Job Information (EmpJob)'' Entity to get the any of data related to employee with all the employment and status as well 
In it you can find all the field as well as custom MDF data 

Select this "EmpJob" entity and select the field which need, if additional data try to go into other NAv entity

Regard,
Arun Singh

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner NODE.JS update
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, it is indeed possible for you to upgrade node.js on your own.
You just need to ensure that you upgrade to the same major version of node.js, i.e. version 18.
PD 16.7 SP07 supports node.js 18.20.4.

Kind regards

"

"

So I understand that I don't have any user to log on SAP.

As standard it shows locked till the Step Process as per the order of Process Variant
But it still show Locked if Onboardee doesn't have necessary RBP Permission

entry.title: App "Define selections" - how to extract relevant data based on acquisition date
entry.content:
Hi all,

n the Fiori app "Define Selections," there are two fields: "Period of Acquisition" and "Year of Acquisition."

I would expect this fields to enable the retrieval and filtering of data (across all consolidation units, financial statement items, subitems, document types, and other relevant criteria/fields specified in the selection) based on the assignment date of the first consolidation (as specified by the "Year of First Consolidation" field in the "Manage Consolidation Group Structure" app).

However, after conducting some tests, it appears that the filters "Period of Acquisition" and "Year of Acquisition" are not functioning as expected. Actually, they aren't working at all.

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to use them or know if I might be overlooking something?

The purpose is creating a selection which would extract the consolidation units ( and  relevant fs items, document types) acquired in the previous year.

TIA for any insight

entry.title: Knowledge Graph and GraphRAG: Implementation with SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) and Future Perspec
entry.content:
Greetings,

We are currently exploring the implementation of GraphRAG using HANA Cloud / Datasphere Knowledge Graph. We are looking to leverage SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) for this purpose and are in the process of gathering information on the specific implementation methods. However, we are currently facing a lack of detailed information and would greatly appreciate your expertise and insights.

Specifically, we would be grateful if you could provide guidance on the following points:

Specific Implementation Methods for GraphRAG using SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub):

To realize GraphRAG, which functionalities of SAP AI Core should we utilize, and how can we effectively integrate them with HANA Cloud (Datasphere) Knowledge Graph?
Could you provide detailed information such as concrete architecture examples, implementation steps, and considerations?
For instance, what components (models, pipelines, etc.)
should be built within AI Core, and how can we optimally orchestrate query execution against the Knowledge Graph, vector search, and response generation?

Comparison of Architecture with Microsoft's GraphRAG:

As a general concept for GraphRAG, there is an architecture proposed by Microsoft, as referenced here: https://microsoft.github.io/graphrag/
(Considering aspects such as Community Report generation, Global Search, and Local Search).
Is the GraphRAG architecture within the SAP environment similar to Microsoft's architecture?
If there are differences, could you please elaborate on SAP's unique architecture or the optimized GraphRAG approach for the SAP environment?
In particular, we are interested in understanding the unique advantages and characteristics of SAP's GraphRAG when leveraging Knowledge Graphs.

We look forward to receiving your valuable information and opinions.
Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Instance Refresh from SF Prod to Test- IPSADMIN admin...
entry.content:
Hi Kartik,

As this is a prerequisite, before refresh you should have at least one user with the same email id and Password , which we use IPSADMIN

If it is not then you might have issue to login in the system after Refresh, because refresh is only for SuccessFactors System, and after refresh when the next sync job will run it will fetch the user data as per the new system 

So which create issue in the login which could impact to change setting and configuration in IAS also

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Interview Timezone
entry.content: Yes in the email the time will be as per Interview Scheduler which is Recruiter but if candidate check on the Career Site then it will show per the Candidate Location

entry.title: Re: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice...
entry.content: My experience proves otherwise unfortunately.

entry.title: Re: Missing SAP predelivered content in Description of dangerous goods packages
entry.content: @Paulo_Pinto Thank you for your ideas. @JonasEd Thank you for the question, I am not 100% sure that this will help you. But based on your response, I would point you to the SAP Note 2972572. I will also consult my manager and see if she has more to add because I am not familiar with anything from the "classic setup"

entry.title: Re: Opinion about ALM Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hi, Hugo13,

I already worked in 5 SAP CALM implementation projects that was using Features capabilities and I have some experience.  The use of SAP CALM for transport management is evolving, and some functionalities are still being improved, for example the automatic TR Checks before importing to PRD is a great addition, but for QA still you need to run manually via /SDF/TRCHECK .

The blog from @DoloresCorrea  is indeed a great resource, especially for those coming from a ChaRM background. (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/first-steps-to-work-with-sap-cloud-alm-deployment-scenario-for-sap-abap/ba-p/13627068) .  My recommendation would be to set up a dummy scenario so you can test and gain confidence.

let me know if we can help you with something. 
WenSolman

entry.title: Remove the approval process for purchase requisitions
entry.content:
I want to remove the approval process for purchase requisitions.

Process: Operation Outsourcing

A purchase requisition is automatically generated from the production order, but when creating a purchase order from the purchase requisition, an error occurs because the purchase requisition is not approved. Therefore, I want to proceed without approval for the purchase requisition. Please advise.

entry.title: Re: How to hide some "screen" on MDG
entry.content:
Hi

CBA does not have role but you can use Workflow Step for this.......if the concern is the data privacy, i think it would be good if you can explore data masking which helps in hiding the data without the need to do any UI changes

entry.title: Re: Usage report for C4C (by user and duration)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm looking for a report that shows usage of C4C, by login and time, and so far I've found the following.

In Silverlight --> Admin --> General Settings --> Usage and Response Time Statistics

The first report 'Usage Statistics' is ok from a high-level perspective

The other (beta) reports just open a blank screen to me. I think I've seen these in the past and they should be able to tell me who has logged into the system and their duration. Am I just dreaming or should this work...or is there another out-of-the-box report I can run to get what i'm looking for? Want to download the report

Thanks in advance

entry.content: Thanks for reporting this so quickly after the release. I reported it, and then luckily Marie and company found the issue. 😺

entry.title: Re: Budget Values showing different values in executive r...

entry.title: Requirement to Verify Group Journal Entries
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have implemented the Group Journal Entry Workflow in our system. But we are unable to verify Group Journal Entries were reviewed through the workflow. We wish to confirm is there a similar app to Verify General Journal Entries? 

We intend to see the group journal entries status, the submitter's name, and the name of the person who accepted or rejected them etc.

Regards,

Abha Hardikar

entry.title: Re: how to use standard gender field in custom MDF as thi...
entry.content:
Hi @SFEC31 

The Standard gender field is defined in Picklist, "gender". 

In the MDF object at field select the Data Type as Picklist and at valid values source type gender, so the standard gender field gets associated.

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: PCE / AWS Connectivity qestionnaire/Transit Gateway Q...
entry.content:
@SUSUMU_ITO 

I translated from Japanese to English your questions;

Q1: If there are multiple VPCs communicating with PCE AWS, do I need to provide all VPC IDs?

Yes, you need to provide the VPC IDs of all VPCs that will communicate with RISE PCE on AWS.

Transit Gateway acts as a hub to interconnect multiple VPCs. If you intend to connect multiple VPCs in your customer environment to PCE AWS via Transit Gateway, all VPCs that need to communicate with PCE AWS must be attached to the Transit Gateway. SAP will configure that. 

Q2: If there are configuration changes, such as adding customer VPCs, will additional settings be required on the PCE side?

Also yes, when you add a VPC, it needs to be attached to the Transit Gateway, and routes need to be configured between that VPC and PCE AWS.

  • Configuration Steps for AWS Transit Gateway - SAP HANA on AWS: This document describes the configuration steps for SAP HANA on AWS using AWS Transit Gateway, check it out. https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sap/latest/sap-hana/sap-oip-configuration-steps-for-aws-transit-gateway.html

entry.title: Ability to read xlsx file in SAP CI or to send xlsx file from SAP CI to S4HANA and read the excel
entry.content:
Hello,

   I would like to know if there is any possibility to read xlsx file in SAP CI ( or ) do we have any other option to send xlsx file from SAP CI and can read the excel file in the ABAP.

 

Thanks,

Shiva.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Smart Filter - Date picker Behaviour
entry.content:
Hi Vijay, 

it looks like the dynamic date range flag is set to true somewhere and is enabled during the deployment. (refer to the annotations in the gateway, manifest file or in the smart control code) 

https://www.sap.com/design-system/fiori-design-web/v1-96/ui-elements/dynamic-date-range-2/?external

to override the behaviour , try to apply useDateRangeType="false" property explicitly to the SmartFilterBar control
 
Refer to the api documentation samples for more info  on this (Smart Filter Bar with DateRangeType and Smart Filter Bar with controlConfiguration conditionType customDateRangeType)
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar.SmartFilterBar
 
Regards
Virinchy

Hello all, 

I`m wondering how Partner country is selected regarding arrivals from third parties suppliers with multiple registrations in EU countries

 

thank you in advance

It really feels like a very obvious solution, but somehow I did not think about using aspects like this 😄

entry.title: Re: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Posi...

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: 1 warehouse order for outbound with two activity areas

entry.title: Re: Upsert Operation in CAP NodeJS

entry.title: Re: System is not calculating the number of months from h...
entry.content:
Hi @S0025059296 

Can you validate the number of days (Get number of calendar days) in the business rule instead of months? 

Thanks & Regards

Arun
